per_criterion.name: Typography vs Emil
per_criterion.note: Both share the same restrained type system; v2 does not degrade it, but neither matches Emil's tighter measure and more generous leading.

per_criterion.name: Personality vs Daniel
per_criterion.note: v1 is uniformly flat until hover; v2's visible artifact (green/red diff text, tool cards) lends a diary-like, hand-on-it quality.

per_criterion.name: Hero communicates 'designing with machines'
per_criterion.note: v1's 'designing with machines' is just a tagline; v2 makes it literal by landing with a chat-driven iteration history visible in-frame.

per_criterion.name: Vignettes feel like considered artifacts
per_criterion.note: The Notebook reads as a crafted artifact with numbered iterations and annotated diffs rather than a screenshot dumped in a card.

per_criterion.name: Shows the work on first contact
per_criterion.note: v1 is a wall of prose with a hidden-on-hover right column; v2 is the only one that honors the brief's explicit foreground.

decisive_criterion: Shows the work on first contact
